title: Vertigo
blurb: Glass towers fold into a single vanishing point — looking straight up until the city loses its horizon.

title: The Long Climb
blurb: A lone figure against a relentless run of stairs. Scale, symmetry, and the patience of the climb.

title: Spiral
blurb: Shot from above, the crowd becomes texture and the pavement becomes a drawing.

title: Geometry
blurb: Pure white volumes notch into a hard blue sky — modern architecture reduced to line and shadow.

title: Red Mirror
blurb: A red-lit facade meets its own perfect reflection — symmetry burning in the dark.

title: Pagoda
blurb: A lone figure pauses beneath a towering timber pagoda — scale, age and stillness.

title: Red Umbrella
blurb: A single red umbrella punctuates a sunlit avenue of golden facades.

title: Framed
blurb: A pagoda and a distant skyline, framed by a broken wall — a window built by time.

title: Eternal
blurb: The Colosseum under a heavy, moving sky. One bird, two thousand years.

title: After Rain
blurb: Wet asphalt doubles the streetlights. The quiet minute right after a storm passes.

title: Red on the Steps
blurb: A single figure in red climbs the Spanish Steps — colour as the entire composition.

title: Autumn Lamp
blurb: A streetlamp stands plain against a riot of red maple — the manmade meeting the seasonal.

title: Ferris
blurb: A wheel of cold blue light, mirrored perfectly in still water below.

title: Temple Eaves
blurb: Vermilion eaves and dougong brackets cut hard against a cloudless blue.

title: Ginkgo Sky
blurb: Golden ginkgo leaves spill into a deep blue sky — autumn at full volume.

title: Window Light
blurb: A quiet portrait in soft window light, framed by old timber.

title: Oculus
blurb: Looking up into a woven wooden dome that radiates from a single bright eye.

title: Black Swan
blurb: A black swan carves a slow wake across green water — one decisive subject, nothing else.

title: Solitude
blurb: One walker on a long, bare avenue. The leading lines do all the talking.

title: Pinwheel
blurb: An orange paper pinwheel held up to a vast blue, clouds drifting on behind it.
